## `ai/` (15 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `ai/any-density` | medium | on | ‚úì | TypeScript `any` density deviates from human baseline ‚Äî AI agents use `any` as a type-safety escape hatch (Lee, Hassan, Hindle, MSR 2026) |
| `ai/comment-ratio` | medium | on | ‚úì | Comment-line ratio deviates from corpus baseline ‚Äî reductive models skip comments, expansive models over-comment (Rahman et al. 2024, Bisztray et al. 2025) |
| `ai/compression-profile` | low | on | ‚úì | NCD/compression profile shows AI boilerplate ‚Äî gzip ratio > 0.50 + low line-to-line NCD variation (Cilibrasi 2005, Mahoney 1999) |
| `ai/console-debug-storm` | low | on | ‚úì | ‚â•10 console.log/debug/info/warn/error + debugger statements, no structured logger ‚Äî GitClear 2025 (AI debug noise often left in) |
| `ai/default-react-stack` | low | on | ‚úì | File uses ‚â•3 of the default React stack (Next.js + TanStack Query + Zustand + shadcn/ui) ‚Äî Sascha 2025 + Nam et al. MSR 2026 |
| `ai/errors-near-eof` | medium | off | ‚úì | Unbalanced delimiters or syntax errors cluster near EOF ‚Äî likely AI token-limit truncation (Yotkova 2026) |
| `ai/fetch-default-overuse` | low | on | ‚úì | ‚â•3 direct fetch() calls with no TanStack Query / SWR / axios ‚Äî Sascha 2025 (LLMs default to raw fetch even when libs exist) |
| `ai/library-reinvention` | medium | on | ‚úì | File reinvents ‚â•2 common patterns (date picker, form validation, chart, modal, etc.) without importing the canonical library ‚Äî GitClear 2025 + Cui et al. 2025 |
| `ai/markdown-leakage` | high | on | ‚úì | Stray Markdown fence or bare language name at top of file ‚Äî AI tools leak the fenced-block format into code |
| `ai/renyi-profile` | medium | on | ‚úì | R√©nyi entropy profile shows AI mass concentration ‚Äî H_2/H_1 > 0.85 + H_‚àû/H_1 > 0.95 (R√©nyi 1961, Moslonka 2025) |
| `ai/segment-surprisal-cv` | medium | off | ‚úì | Per-segment cross-entropy CV is suspiciously low ‚Äî Binoculars (Hans 2024): AI text has near-constant per-window entropy |
| `ai/state-default-overuse` | low | on | ‚úì | ‚â•5 useState calls with no useReducer / Zustand / Jotai ‚Äî Sascha 2025 (LLMs produce 2022-era state patterns) |
| `ai/tailwind-color-overuse` | low | on | ‚úì | Tailwind class strings over-represent the default palette (blue-500, slate-50, rounded-lg) ‚Äî Sascha 2025 + Douglas 2025 |
| `ai/text-like-ratio` | low | on | ‚úì | High ratio of prose-like lines embedded in code ‚Äî AI tools often leave natural-language explanations in source files (Yotkova 2026) |
| `ai/whitespace-regularity` | medium | off | ‚úì | Inter-token whitespace distribution is suspiciously uniform ‚Äî AI code uses regular spacing patterns (Shi et al. 2024, DetectCodeGPT) |

## `component/` (3 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `component/giant-component` | high | on | ‚úì | Component file AST complexity exceeds threshold (triggers Context Window Tax). |
| `component/multiple-components-per-file` | medium | on | ‚úì | File contains 2+ component definitions ‚Äî split into separate files. |
| `component/shadcn-prop-mismatch` | high | on | ‚úì | Legacy `className` prop assignment on shadcn/ui components whose registry schema explicitly excludes it. |

## `cpp/` (4 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `cpp/c-style-cast` | low | on | ‚úì | C-style cast `(int)x` ‚Äî use static_cast / reinterpret_cast / const_cast so the kind is greppable. |
| `cpp/magic-numbers` | low | on | ‚úì | Magic-number literal in a comparison / return ‚Äî name it: `constexpr int MAX = 1024;`. |
| `cpp/printf-debug` | low | on | ‚úì | printf family or std::cout debug printing ‚Äî use spdlog / glog / AbslLog for level-controlled output. |
| `cpp/raw-new-delete` | low | on | ‚úì | Manual `new` / `delete` pairing ‚Äî use std::make_unique / std::unique_ptr instead. |

## `cs/` (3 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `cs/async-without-await` | medium | off | ‚Äî | `async` method body has no `await` ‚Äî runs synchronously, indicates design mistake |
| `cs/empty-catch-block` | medium | off | ‚Äî | Empty C# catch block or `throw;` re-throw without context ‚Äî silent failure |
| `cs/sql-string-interpolation` | high | off | ‚Äî | C# interpolated string in SQL query ‚Äî use FromSqlInterpolated? or SqlCommand.Parameters |

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `dart/dynamic-call` | medium | off | ‚úì | dynamic or `as` cast bypasses Dart's type safety. |
| `dart/missing-dispose` | high | off | ‚úì | Controller or subscription not disposed; possible memory leak in Flutter. |
| `dart/print-debug` | medium | off | ‚úì | print() is debug output; use debugPrint() or a logger in production. |
| `dart/unwrapped-futures` | high | off | ‚úì | Async call may not be awaited; errors could be silently swallowed. |

|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `db/sql-concat` | high | on | ‚úì | Template-literal SQL query with ${...} interpolation ‚Äî use parameterized queries. |

## `dead/` (5 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `dead/dead-branch` | medium | on | ‚úì | Literal boolean condition makes one branch statically dead |
| `dead/unreachable` | high | on | ‚úì | Statement is unreachable after an unconditional return/throw/break/continue |
| `dead/unused-import` | low | on | ‚úì | ES module import is never referenced in the file |
| `dead/unused-local` | low | on | ‚úì | Variable is declared but never read after declaration |
| `dead/unused-parameter` | low | on | ‚úì | Function parameter is declared but never read |

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `docs/broken-link` | low | on | ‚Äî | Markdown link target is relative and does not resolve to a file on disk. |
| `docs/stale-function-reference` | medium | on | ‚Äî | Markdown references an identifier in a calling context (foo()) that is not exported by the project. |
| `docs/stale-package-reference` | medium | on | ‚Äî | Markdown references a package (npm install / from / require) that is not in package.json. |

## `dup/` (3 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `dup/identical-block` | medium | on | ‚Äî | Block of >=10 lines is identical across >=2 files (Type-1 clone detector) |
| `dup/near-duplicate` | medium | off | ‚úì | Near-duplicate file (Type-2 clone) ‚Äî token-set Jaccard similarity > 0.7 |
| `dup/structural-clone` | medium | off | ‚úì | Structural clone (Type-3) ‚Äî same shape after identifier canonicalization with possible added/removed statements. Two-stage MinHash: canonical + identifier. |

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `go/nil-slice-vs-empty` | low | off | ‚úì | Variable declared `var x []int` but later assigned `x = []int{}` or `make([]int, n)` ‚Äî pick one form |
| `go/struct-tag-inconsistency` | low | off | ‚úì | Struct fields mix json:"foo" and json:"foo,omitempty" ‚Äî pick one convention per struct |

## `java/` (4 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `java/lost-stack-trace` | medium | on | ‚Äî | catch block throws a new exception without the original cause ‚Äî stack trace is lost |
| `java/sql-string-concat` | high | off | ‚Äî | SQL query built via string concat ‚Äî use PreparedStatement or setParameter() |
| `java/suspicious-implementation` | high | on | ‚Äî | function name suggests validation/encryption/auth but body is empty or trivially wrong ‚Äî content mismatch |
| `java/thread-sleep-in-loop` | medium | off | ‚Äî | Thread.sleep() in a loop ‚Äî use ScheduledExecutorService or BlockingQueue |

## `kt/` (4 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `kt/coroutine-cancellation-missing` | medium | off | ‚Äî | Kotlin coroutine (launch/async) without cancellation checks ‚Äî runs forever if scope is cancelled |
| `kt/force-unwrap` | medium | off | ‚Äî | Kotlin `!!` not-null assertion bypasses null safety ‚Äî will throw NPE if value is null |
| `kt/global-coroutine-scope` | medium | off | ‚Äî | `GlobalScope.launch/async` defeats structured concurrency ‚Äî leaks when calling component is destroyed |
| `kt/string-template-injection` | high | off | ‚Äî | Kotlin string template or concat flows into SQL/shell/file sink ‚Äî user input in a query/command/path |

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|

| `layout/math-grid-uniformity` | high | on | ‚úì | grid-cols-N tokens show low entropy ‚Äî AI uses one column count everywhere, humans vary |
| `layout/spacing-grid` | medium | on | ‚Äî | Spacing values outside the project scale |

## `logic/` (12 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `logic/boundary-violation` | high | on | ‚úì | Server-side data-layer / DB import leaked into a client component, or a client React hook used inside a server file (RSC boundary violation) |
| `logic/ghost-defensive` | medium | on | ‚úì | Defensive code for impossible cases |
| `logic/heaps-deviation` | medium | on | ‚Äî | File vocabulary growth (Heaps Œª) deviates significantly from corpus baseline ‚Äî peer-reviewed LLM indicator (Christ et al. EMNLP 2025) |
| `logic/key-prop-missing` | high | on | ‚úì | Items in a list missing a React key |
| `logic/math-any-density` | high | on | ‚úì | `: any` density ‚â• 3 per 100 lines ‚Äî AI sprinkling of `any` types |
| `logic/math-console-log-storm` | high | on | ‚úì | ‚â•5 console.logs clustered in a single window ‚Äî AI debug-spraying pattern |
| `logic/math-gini-class-usage` | high | on | ‚úì | Gini coefficient of class usage ‚â• 0.5 ‚Äî a few classes dominate (AI defaults to a tiny vocabulary) |
| `logic/math-variable-name-entropy` | high | on | ‚Äî | Identifier names show low Shannon entropy ‚Äî AI defaults to a small vocabulary of generic names |
| `logic/optimistic-no-rollback` | high | on | ‚úì | Optimistic UI update without rollback error handling. |
| `logic/reactive-hook-soup` | medium | on | ‚úì | `useEffect` chains manually syncing local state. |
| `logic/zipf-slope-anomaly` | medium | on | ‚Äî | File identifier rank-frequency distribution (Zipf s) deviates from corpus baseline ‚Äî peer-reviewed LLM indicator |
| `logic/zombie-state` | medium | on | ‚úì | useState bindings that are never read |

## `product/` (2 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `product/terminology-drift` | medium | on | ‚úì | Three or more semantically-similar component names differ (e.g. PostList/ArticleList/NewsList on the "List" suffix, or PostList/PostDetail/PostCard on the "Post" prefix). AI agents pick slightly different words each invocation; pick one and standardize. |
| `product/ux-pattern-fragmentation` | medium | on | ‚úì | Too many distinct UX patterns per category (e.g. 5 modal implementations, 4 confirmation dialogs). Pick one canonical pattern per category and remove the rest. |

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|

| `rb/n-plus-one-query` | medium | off | ‚Äî | N+1 query pattern in ActiveRecord ‚Äî loop calls association without eager loading |
| `rb/sql-string-concat` | high | off | ‚Äî | Ruby SQL string concat or interpolation ‚Äî use ActiveRecord / Sequel parameterized queries |

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|

| `rust/unwrap-in-production` | medium | on | ‚úì | .unwrap() / .expect() called outside of #[cfg(test)] / #[test] scope |

## `security/` (11 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `security/dangerous-cors` | medium | on | ‚úì | Wildcard or reflective CORS configuration: 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *' / origin: '*' / origin: true. |
| `security/eval` | high | on | ‚Äî | eval() / new Function() / window.eval() ‚Äî RCE vector when the argument is attacker-controlled (OWASP A03:2021) |
| `security/exposed-env-var` | high | on | ‚Äî | Secret-looking env var name exposed via a client-bundle prefix (NEXT_PUBLIC_*, VITE_*, etc.). Inlined into every browser build. |
| `security/fail-open-auth` | high | on | ‚úì | Authentication or middleware handler returns early (true/next) based on a development-environment check ‚Äî auth bypass that ships to production. |
| `security/hardcoded-secret` | high | on | ‚úì | String literal assigned to a sensitive identifier or matching a known provider key prefix (sk-, AKIA, ghp_, etc.). |
| `security/localstorage-token` | high | on | ‚Äî | Auth token stored in localStorage ‚Äî vulnerable to XSS exfiltration (OWASP A03:2021). |
| `security/missing-auth-check` | medium | on | ‚Äî | Server route handler (Next.js route.ts / pages/api / Express route) with no detectable authentication or authorization check. |
| `security/public-admin-route` | medium | on | ‚Äî | Privileged route (path contains /admin, /internal, /debug, etc.) without an additional role/permission check. |
| `security/sql-construction` | high | on | ‚úì | SQL query built by string concatenation or template interpolation ‚Äî use parameterized queries / prepared statements instead. |
| `security/target-blank-no-noopener` | medium | on | ‚Äî | Link with target="_blank" missing rel="noopener" ‚Äî window.opener can |
| `security/unsafe-html-render` | high | on | ‚Äî | dangerouslySetInnerHTML used with a non-literal value (variable, template literal, expression) ‚Äî unsanitized HTML injection risk. |

## `swift/` (5 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `swift/fatal-error-thrown` | high | off | ‚úì | fatalError / preconditionFailure in production ‚Äî crashes unconditionally. Return an error or a typed default. |
| `swift/force-unwrap` | medium | off | ‚úì | Swift force-unwrap (as!, var!.prop, try!) ‚Äî silently crashes if the value is nil. Use as? / guard let / try?. |
| `swift/implicitly-unwrapped-optional` | low | off | ‚úì | Implicitly unwrapped optional (var x: Type!) ‚Äî declare as Type? and unwrap with guard let. |
| `swift/print-debug` | low | off | ‚úì | print(...) in production Swift ‚Äî use Logger (os.log) for level-controlled output |
| `swift/strong-self-capture` | medium | off | ‚úì | Closure captures `self` strongly ‚Äî creates a retain cycle. Use `[weak self]` or `[unowned self]`. |

## `test/` (3 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `test/duplicate-setup` | medium | on | ‚úì | Repeated beforeEach/beforeAll/setupServer blocks within the same file. Extract to a helper. |
| `test/fake-placeholder` | high | on | ‚úì | Object-literal fixture uses textbook placeholder data (e.g. 'John Doe', 'test@test.com', id: 1). |
| `test/weak-assertion` | medium | on | ‚úì | Assertion does not test a specific value (e.g. expect(x).toBeDefined(), expect(x).toBeTruthy(), expect(x).toBe(x)). |

## `ts/` (4 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `ts/enum-vs-as-const` | low | off | ‚úì | Uses `enum` ‚Äî modern TS prefers `as const` objects |
| `ts/excessive-type-assertion` | low | off | ‚úì | Function with >3 `as` type assertions ‚Äî likely AI fighting the type system |
| `ts/import-type-misuse` | low | off | ‚úì | Inline `import { type X }` ‚Äî prefer `import type { X }` for clarity |
| `ts/never-vs-unknown` | low | off | ‚úì | Return type `: never` but body has no throw / loop / exit ‚Äî likely AI misuse |

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `typo/math-button-label-uniformity` | medium | on | ‚úì | Button text lengths have suspiciously low variance ‚Äî AI writes "Get started", "Sign up", "Learn more" |
| `typo/placeholder-text` | low | on | ‚Äî | Placeholder text contains dev/AI defaults (Lorem ipsum, Enter text here, TODO, etc.) ‚Äî unfinished UI. |

## `visual/` (10 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `visual/arbitrary-escape` | medium | on | ‚úì | Bracket-notation Tailwind values (e.g. `p-[13px]`, `bg-[#7c3aed]`) ‚Äî AI agents reach for arbitrary escapes instead of design tokens (Refactoring UI; M√§ntyl√§ 2003) |
| `visual/inline-style-dominance` | medium | on | ‚úì | File uses inline styles for 3+ distinct properties ‚Äî prefer className utilities. |
| `visual/math-color-cluster` | high | on | ‚úì | Hex colors cluster in a tight hue range (‚â§90¬∞ spread) ‚Äî AI default-palette tell |
| `visual/math-default-font` | high | on | ‚úì | UI uses framework default font (Inter/system) with no custom font import ‚Äî strong AI signature |
| `visual/math-font-entropy` | high | on | ‚úì | Text-size tokens show low entropy ‚Äî AI uses 2‚Äì3 sizes, humans use 4‚Äì6 |
| `visual/math-rounded-entropy` | high | on | ‚úì | Border-radius tokens show abnormally low entropy ‚Äî AI sticks to lg/xl/full |
| `visual/math-spacing-entropy` | medium | on | ‚úì | Numeric spacing tokens show abnormally low entropy ‚Äî AI tends to repeat the same 2‚Äì3 spacing values |
| `visual/naturalness-anomaly` | medium | on | ‚úì | Identifier stream has unusually low distinct-token ratio (<30%) ‚Äî AI-default-naming signature (Hindle 2012 ¬ß4.3). |
| `visual/radius-scale-violation` | medium | on | ‚Äî | Border-radius utility uses an arbitrary value (e.g. `rounded-[7px]`) outside the declared design-system scale. |
| `visual/spacing-scale-violation` | medium | on | ‚Äî | Spacing utility uses an arbitrary value (e.g. `p-[13px]`) outside the declared design-system scale. |

## `wcag/` (3 rules)

| Rule | Severity | Default | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-------:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `wcag/focus-appearance` | high | on | ‚Äî | Inject a global focus-ring CSS block (`*:focus-visible { outline: ... }`) ‚Äî WCAG 2.4.7 (Focus Visible) |
| `wcag/focus-obscured` | low | on | ‚Äî | Sticky/fixed positioning that hides focused siblings. |
| `wcag/missing-alt` | medium | on | ‚Äî | <img> element is missing an `alt` attribute (WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1, Level A). |

## Glossary

- **Default** ‚Äî whether the rule runs out of the box. Rules marked `off` are `defaultOff: true` in [../src/rules/signal-strength.json](../src/rules/signal-strength.json) (typically INVERTED, NOISY, or DORMANT calibration verdict) and require explicit opt-in via `rules: { '<id>': 'medium' }` in `slopbrick.config.mjs`.
- **AI-specific** ‚Äî the rule only fires on patterns introduced (or disproportionately introduced) by AI coding agents. Rules without the ‚úì may still correlate with AI authorship but the underlying pattern is not AI-unique.
- **Severity** ‚Äî see [scoring-runbook.md](./scoring-runbook.md) for the per-severity weight in PR Slop Score.

## Regenerating this catalog

This file is **auto-generated** by [scripts/generate-rule-catalog.ts](../scripts/generate-rule-catalog.ts) which reads each rule file in [../src/rules/](../src/rules/) and [../src/rules/signal-strength.json](../src/rules/signal-strength.json) for the `defaultOff` flag.

If you add or change a rule, regenerate the registry (which also regenerates this catalog):

```bash
pnpm generate:rules
```

This runs automatically before `pnpm build` and `pnpm test` via the existing `prebuild` / pre-`test` chain.
